testcase.name: test_auth_me_admin_user
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_and_roles.py:50: in test_auth_me_admin_user assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_me_student_user
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_and_roles.py:70: in test_auth_me_student_user assert data["role"] == "student" E AssertionError: assert 'teacher' == 'student' E E - student E + teacher
